response.justification: While the candidate has a robust technical background with excellent open-source contributions and system design skills, he does not meet the critical German C1 language requirement, possessing only basic German proficiency. Additionally, his career history is predominantly as a Senior/Staff Individual Contributor, lacking the proven executive-level operational leadership, formal team management, and client advisory experience required for this Head of Development role.
strengths: Extensive experience in modern software development and open-source technologies, aligning well with the company's focus.
Proven ability to design and build complex, scalable systems, demonstrated by his work on GISCollective and at Dunnhumby.
Strong commitment to mentoring and knowledge sharing, evidenced by organizing various technical workshops and Refactoring Dojos.
concerns: Does not meet the mandatory German language requirement (minimum C1), possessing only basic proficiency.
Lacks proven executive-level leadership, formal team management, and operational oversight experience.
Missing explicit experience in formal enterprise IT architecture, UML modeling, and IT security/compliance advisory for clients.
